description: Tenant-level shared connection to external data sources (not workspace-scoped)
notes: Tenant-level scope: endpoints at /connections/{id} (NO workspace prefix)
Connectivity types: ShareableCloud, OnPremises, VirtualNetworkGateway, PersonalCloud
Credential types: Basic, OAuth2, Key, Anonymous, ServicePrincipal, WorkspaceIdentity
Privacy levels: None, Public, Organizational, Private
Parameters provided as JSON object are converted to array format automatically
list-supported-types returns all available connection type definitions
